{{Quote|The Tumble Bunnies are jumping for joy, 'cause you've come to see their show!|The Tumble Bunny trainer|<ref name="hhh" />}}
A '''trainer''' of [[Tumble Bunny|Tumble Bunnies]] found work as an entertainer on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They were popular with the [[Wokling/Legends|woklings]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the Tumble Bunny trainer hosted a Tumble Bunny exhibition at the [[Bright Tree Fête]] for a wokling audience. The Tumble Bunny trainer's show, although well received by the woklings, was not without its detractors. Budding [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket W. Warrick]] spoke out against the show, decrying it as "no place for a warrior to be seen."

==Biography==
{{Quote|Let's go see the… ugh… Tumble Bunnies.|Wicket W. Warrick|<ref name="hhh" />}}
[[File:TumbleBunnies-HHoH.png|thumb|left|250px|Three Tumble Bunnies and their trainer]]
The Tumble Bunny trainer was of a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were green in color, though pink at the neck and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]; they also had a bill. The trainer had a show in which small animals called [[Tumble Bunny|Tumble Bunnies]] were made to perform tricks for a live audience. One such stunt involved having the Tumble Bunnies jump through a hoop held up by the Tumble Bunny trainer.<ref name="hhh" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="EwoksDate">{{EwoksDate|appearance of the [[Tumble Bunny]] [[Beastmaster/Legends|trainer]]|[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]]}}</ref> the Tumble Bunny trainer performed their show at [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]], as a part of a [[Bright Tree Fête|festival]] in the village. While performing, the trainer's show gathered an audience of [[Wokling/Legends|woklings]]. These young Ewoks enjoyed the show, and the Tumble Bunny trainer called out to the other [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] at the fête, hoping to attract a larger audience.<ref name="hhh" />

Word of their act reached fellow fête participant [[Shodu Warrick]], who sent her son, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]], and daughter, the wokling [[Winda Warrick|Winda]], off to see the show. Upon arriving at the Tumble Bunny trainer's exhibit, however, Wicket scorned the Tumble Bunny trainer's performance and announced that an aspiring warrior such as himself should not be seen attending such a display. Accordingly, he and his friends loudly decided to seek other forms of entertainment. Later, as punishment for not suitably looking after the woklings under his care, Wicket was forced to emulate the Tumble Bunny trainer's act, even going so far as to wear the same Tumble Bunny-resembling attire while doing so.<ref name="hhh" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Who-who-ha-ha-ha!|The Tumble Bunny trainer|<ref name="hhh" />}}
When performing, the Tumble Bunny trainer displayed enthusiasm, jovially interacting with their audience, from whom they garnered positive responses.<ref name="hhh" />

==Equipment==
For attire while performing, the Tumble Bunny trainer dressed in a yellow suit that featured the three ears of the Tumble Bunnies, imitating, to a degree, the centerpieces of their show.<ref name="hhh" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Tumble Bunny trainer appeared in an episode of the animated series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] entitled "[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]]," which was written by [[Paul Dini]].<ref name="hhh" /> The episode, a part of the show's [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]], first aired on [[November 15]], [[1986]].<ref name="ins">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)}} {{1st}}
